page.title: Agent Rules
page.description: Manage prompts, system rules, fallback messages, and auto-escalate keywords.

alert.message: Rules should only contain behavior policies and guardrails
alert.description: Use Runtime & Provider for model/provider configuration. Use Agent Tools for tool enablement permissions.

form.brandVoiceExtra: Guide how the agent should communicate with customers.
form.brandVoicePlaceholder: Example: Friendly, use we/you, concise, avoid rambling...
form.systemPromptOverrideExtra: If filled in, this prompt replaces the default dynamic prompt.
form.systemPromptOverridePlaceholder: Leave blank to use the default prompt...
form.fallbackMessageExtra: Message returned when AI encounters an error or cannot handle the request.
form.fallbackMessagePlaceholder: Sorry, we are having a temporary issue...
form.systemRulesPlaceholder: Add a rule, such as: Do not create an order unless the customer has confirmed
form.autoEscalateKeywordsPlaceholder: Example: refund, cancel order, talk to staff
